titleStmt.title: SII 20.9: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 9. (B.K. No. 115 of 1938-39.) ĀḌŪR, HANGAL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: On a stone standing on the top of a hill (survey No. 146).

summary.p: The record, in characters of about the 7-8th century A.D., contains two parts. The first part, registers gift of a field for the dāna-s11ālā of a Jinālaya constructed by a gāmuṇḍa. The epigraph was erected by Srīpāla, grandson of Dharma-gāmuṇḍa, and disciple of Prabhā[chandra ?] of Paralūra-gaṇa.

It further records a grant of wet land to the west of Karmmagere (?), for the benefit of the Jinālaya, by Dōṇa-gāmuṇḍa and others with the permission of Mādhavatti when Sindarasa was governing Gaṅgi-Pāṇḍivura. Prabhāchandra-gurava of Paralūra-gaṇa was the recipient of the gift.
Published in Ind., Ant., Vol. XI, pp. 68-�• See also Karnataka Inscriptions, Vol. I, pp. 4 ff.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
jayatyanēkadhā viśvaṁ vivṛṇvannaṁśumāniva pravarddhamānadēvō
nityaṁ padmaprabōdhanaḥ . prabhāsiti bhuvaṁ bhūyō
pratāpakṣata vidviṣṭa
bhūritējasā vaijayantyāṁ
tpāśabhṛdviṣamō yamaḥ citravāhana saṁpatyasthitasta dhanēna
gāmuṇḍanirmmāpitajinālayadānaśāḷādisaṁvṛddhyai vijñaptēnayaśasvināpaṁcaviṁ
śati saṁkhyānanivarttanakṛtapramaṁ kṣētraṁ rājamānēna dattaṁ tvahitarakṣanaṁ
śrāvya sākṣiṇaḥ kṛtvā Uñchōrindāpradhānakānanyairapi ca rājanyai rakṣaṇīyaṁ sanā
Uktaṁ ca svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāya
tē kṛmiḥ . svaddātuṁ sumahacchakyaṁ duḥkhamanyasya pālanaṁ dānaṁ vā pālanaṁ vēti dānācchrēyōnu
pālanaṁ . bahubhirvvasudhā bhuktā rājabhissagarādibhiḥ yasya yasya yadā bhūmistasyata
sya tadā phalaṁ . Āsīdvinayanaṁdīti paravāragaṇāgraṇīrindrabhūtirivācārāt
phasaṁha tēḥ . tasyāntēvasannāsīt vāsudēmō gururguruḥ tasya śiṣyaḥ prabhā
śiṣyaḥ śrīpālanāmāsya dharmmagāmuṇḍaputrajaḥ prātiṣṭipacchilāpaṭṭaṁ sthēyādācandratārakaṁ .
svasti śrīmatprithuvīvallabharājādhirājaparamēśvara kīrtivarmmarasar prithuvirājyaṁge
ye sindarasarggaṁgipāṇḍivūramānāḷe paramēśvaraṁ mādhavattiyarasargge vijñāpanaṁge
ydu dōṇagāmuṇḍaruṁ Eḷagāmuṇḍaruṁ maḷḷersaruṁ Uñchurāvāsaveṟeyaru
karaṇa sahitamāgi havirakṣatagandhapuṣpādigaḷge karmmagaṟūrā paḍuvaṇama
ya keḻage Eṇṭu mattalgaḻde rājamānaṁ jinēndrabhavanakkitettōridanārārsalippōrava
rtte dharmamārāridā keḍippōravartte pāpa . paralūrā cēdiyabbaṟa prabhācandragurāvārpaḍedār .
Digital edition of SII 20.9 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
